scripts.build: bun ../../scripts/extract-stage-rationale.ts && cp ../../install.sh public/install && bun ../../scripts/stage-studio.ts && vite build
scripts.deploy: bun run build && wrangler pages deploy dist/client --project-name=ax --branch=main && bun run verify:functions
scripts.deploy:check: bun run build && echo 'dist/client/ ready for: wrangler pages deploy dist/client --project-name=ax'
scripts.verify:functions: sleep 3 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{content_type}' 'https://ax.necmttn.com/og/Necmttn/a6d4c2215bbe0998c93b38ad11db2ccb' | grep -q image/png && echo 'functions OK on production' || (echo 'PRODUCTION IS MISSING THE PAGES FUNCTIONS (/og, /s meta)' && exit 1)
